title: Fix Internal: Solver error: Argument size at position 1 has sort (_ BitVec 4) it does not match declaration

features.name: bit_shift_in_constraint_with_small_width_rand_variable
features.description: Code should include a constraint with a bit-shift expression where the shift amount is a rand variable of smaller bit-width than the operand

features.name: implication_constraint_with_enum_inside
features.description: Code should include a constraint using implication operator (->) with an enum inside expression on the left-hand side
